rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10 and surface the same substantive concerns — lack of vector database/RAG experience, no explicit LLM performance metrics, and limited mention of major cloud platforms. The differences are pure rewording and reordering of the same points; no new concern, penalty, or shifted reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Wei Chen. This is ordinary run-to-run phrasing noise, not bias.
